items.name: timeline
items.title: Timeline
items.description: A nested, collapsible event timeline with one continuous connector line.

items.name: activity-feed
items.title: Activity Feed
items.description: An avatar-led activity feed with type badges, attachments, date grouping and a live indicator.

items.name: comment-thread
items.title: Comment Thread
items.description: A threaded comment discussion with depth-capped nesting, avatar rows, reactions, replies and collapsible subtrees.

items.name: query-builder
items.title: Query Builder
items.description: A visual, nested AND/OR query builder with a typed field schema and a read-only SQL/JSON live preview with copy.

items.name: json-inspector
items.title: JSON Inspector
items.description: A collapsible, searchable, code-editor-style JSON tree viewer with type coloring, line numbers, match highlighting and per-node path/value copy.

items.name: stat-tile
items.title: Stat Tile
items.description: A KPI stat tile with an animated count-up value, trend delta with semantic coloring (invertable), and a recharts sparkline with gradient fill.

items.name: diff-viewer
items.title: Diff Viewer
items.description: A code-editor-style structural diff viewer for two JSON values, with unified/split toggle, an only-changes filter, type coloring and add/remove/change counts.

items.name: log-stream
items.title: Log Stream
items.description: A live-tail log stream with level filters and counts, message search, auto-scroll with a 'new lines' indicator, and expandable rows for structured detail.

items.name: metric-chart
items.title: Metric Chart
items.description: An observability time-series chart with threshold lines, event annotations, breach shading, and a crosshair tooltip with a click-to-toggle legend.

items.name: trace-waterfall
items.title: Trace Waterfall
items.description: A distributed-trace waterfall: an indented span tree beside time-positioned duration bars, with a time ruler, service colors, error highlighting, collapsible subtrees and hover detail.

items.name: latency-histogram
items.title: Latency Histogram
items.description: A latency distribution histogram with p50/p95/p99 markers, percentile-zone bar coloring, hover bucket counts and a summary stat row; accepts raw samples or pre-bucketed bins.

items.name: status-grid
items.title: Status Grid
items.description: A statuspage-style service health grid: category-grouped rows with current status, uptime, a per-service metric and a 90-day uptime strip, plus an overall status banner and legend.

items.name: cohort-heatmap
items.title: Cohort Heatmap
items.description: A cohort retention heatmap: cohort rows by period columns with intensity-colored cells, in-cell percentages, a column-average row, a color legend and hover detail. Accepts retained counts (+size) or raw percentages.

items.name: audit-trail
items.title: Audit Trail
items.description: A field-level audit trail / changelog: who created/updated/deleted what, when, with old→new field diffs, action badges, date grouping, relative time, actor avatars and actor/action filters.

items.name: alert-feed
items.title: Alert Feed
items.description: An interactive alert/incident feed: severity-grouped rows with acknowledge/resolve actions, a firing-count summary banner, severity/status filters, relative duration and a collapsible resolved section.

items.name: data-freshness
items.title: Data Freshness
items.description: A data-freshness / pipeline-status board: SLA-derived fresh/stale (with failed/running override), a status summary banner, a per-source SLA bar, next-run schedule, source-type icons and row counts.

items.name: data-grid
items.title: Data Grid
items.description: A query-result data grid: type-aware cells, sortable columns, global search + faceted column filters, column visibility, row selection and pagination.

items.name: schema-diagram
items.title: Schema Diagram
items.description: An ER / schema diagram: table cards with typed columns and PK/FK/unique/index badges, drawn FK→PK relationship lines with cardinality markers, relationship hover-highlight and collapsible tables.

items.name: sql-console
items.title: SQL Console
items.description: A SQL console/runner: a syntax-highlighted editor, Run (⌘↵) with running/success/error status, duration + row-count, a result table, an error panel and query history. Bring your own onRun executor.

items.name: data-lineage
items.title: Data Lineage
items.description: A layered data-lineage / DAG viewer: auto-laid-out source→transform→output nodes with dependency edges, direction-selectable transitive lineage tracing, node type/status indicators and an upstream/downstream impact summary.

items.name: resource-monitor
items.title: Resource Monitor
items.description: A live resource monitor: per-resource 270° radial gauges with threshold zones, a history sparkline with peak/avg, a health summary banner and a pause/play live toggle. Self-updating (random walk) with a live prop.

items.name: request-inspector
items.title: Request Inspector
items.description: A DevTools-style HTTP request inspector: a method/url/status summary with Headers, Payload, Timing-waterfall and Response (JSON-formatted) tabs, plus copy buttons.

items.name: data-quality
items.title: Data Quality
items.description: A data-quality / test report: validation checks (not_null, unique, freshness, range…) with pass/warn/fail status, a summary banner with pass-rate, status filters and expandable failure detail.

items.name: treemap
items.title: Treemap
items.description: A squarified treemap: value-proportional nested rectangles colored by category, with a legend and hover detail (value, % of total). Pure computed layout.

items.name: calendar-heatmap
items.title: Calendar Heatmap
items.description: A GitHub-contributions-style calendar heatmap: per-day values laid out as weeks × weekdays with intensity colors, month/weekday labels, a legend and hover detail. Pure UTC layout.

items.name: funnel-chart
items.title: Funnel Chart
items.description: A conversion funnel: centered tapering step bars with counts, % of first, step-over-step drop-off connectors, an overall conversion badge and hover detail. Pure computed layout.

items.name: data-dictionary
items.title: Data Dictionary
items.description: A searchable data dictionary / catalog browser: column metadata (type, table, tags, PII, samples) with match-highlighted search, table filter chips, a PII-only toggle and expandable rows.

items.name: cron-builder
items.title: Cron Builder
items.description: A visual cron/schedule builder: presets (minute/hourly/daily/weekly/monthly/custom) with field editors, a live expression with copy, a human-readable description, validation errors and the next 3 run times (UTC).

items.name: field-mapper
items.title: Field Mapper
items.description: An ETL field mapper: map source fields to a target schema with per-field transform selects, type-mismatch warnings, required validation, name-based auto-map and a mapping summary.

items.name: routing-rules
items.title: Routing Rules
items.description: An ordered, first-match-wins alert routing rules editor: per-rule severity chips, service pattern, channel, enable toggle, reorder/remove/add — plus a live dry-run tester that highlights the matching rule.

items.name: json-path-picker
items.title: JSON Path Picker
items.description: A JSON path picker: click any node in a collapsible JSON tree to build a live JSONPath expression with breadcrumb navigation, a value preview with type info, and copy.

items.name: regex-tester
items.title: Regex Tester
items.description: A regex / log-pattern tester: pattern input with flag chips and validation errors, per-line match indicators with highlighted match spans, and a capture-group table (indexed + named) for the selected line.

items.name: slo-calculator
items.title: SLO Calculator
items.description: An SLO / error-budget calculator: target presets + custom input and a time window produce allowed downtime (total, per-day, per-week), a request-based error budget, and a burn tracker with status.

items.name: access-matrix
items.title: Access Matrix
items.description: A roles × resources access-matrix editor: cells cycle none → read → write, row/column headers bulk-assign, with a live grant summary and per-role counts.

items.name: backoff-planner
items.title: Backoff Planner
items.description: A retry/backoff schedule planner: strategy (fixed/linear/exponential), base delay, multiplier, cap and retry count produce a deterministic attempt table with per-attempt delays, cap badges, cumulative wait and a worst-case total — with a full-jitter range mode.

items.name: id-inspector
items.title: ID Inspector
items.description: A UUID/ULID inspector: paste an identifier to detect its type and version, decode the embedded timestamp (UUID v1/v7, ULID), and see a color-banded segment view (time / randomness / version bits) with a field breakdown.

items.name: jwt-decoder
items.title: JWT Decoder
items.description: A JWT decoder: paste a token to see header and payload claim tables with time claims (exp/iat/nbf) rendered as UTC dates, a color-banded segment view, known-claim annotations and a deterministic lifetime summary — decode only, no signature verification.

items.name: connection-string-builder
items.title: Connection String Builder
items.description: A live database connection-string builder: pick an engine (Postgres/MySQL/Redis/MongoDB), fill host, port, database and credentials, and get a color-highlighted URI with URL-encoded credentials, masked password with show/hide, an SSL toggle and one-click copy.

items.name: rate-limit-simulator
items.title: Rate Limit Simulator
items.description: A deterministic token-bucket rate-limit simulator: set capacity, refill rate, incoming traffic and a pattern (steady/spike/ramp) to get a second-by-second table of tokens, allowed and denied requests with totals and a does-refill-keep-up verdict.
